facts.text: North Bergen remembers its German immigrant roots in Schuetzen Park, founded in 1874, where annual festivals still echo that heritage.
North Bergen Police Force began in 1923, replacing night‑time roundsmen who first patrolled the township in 1907.
The NBC drama Law & Order: SVU shot its police station and courtroom scenes on a stage at North Bergen’s Central Archives on West Side Avenue.
At the Meadowlands, Erie, New York, Susquehanna and Western, and West Shore railroads ran right‑of‑ways to Hudson terminals, the last tunnel through Bergen Hill at North Bergen.
North Bergen’s uneven hills give way to Bergenline Avenue, which stretches to Nungessers near the Fairview border and past North Hudson Park.
